author: Alex S
subject: fix(RangeInput): provide default slot for customization (algolia/vue-instantsearch#492)
body:
* fix(RangeInput): actually set attributeName for the connector

* fix(RangeInput): use v-model for data binding

* docs(RangeInput): document attribute not attributeName

* refactor(RangeInput): implement a default slot

This has several impacts in the implementation as slots have some
limitations.

* docs(RangeInput): add slots documentation

* fix(rangeInput): implement a closer to connector API

* fix(RangeInput): implement noRefinement

* chore: PR feedback

 - added slots
 - support for min max
 - provide more data in the main slot

* docs: fix typo

* refactor: use computed props for min and max possible values

* test(rangeInput): fix test with new properties

* test(rangeInput): refine receives strings now

The transformation to number is handled by the connector.

* chore: prettier fix

* chore: make eslint happy :)
